title: Katie Holmes, Meg Ryan and Jodie Foster Support Female Filmmakers at Chanel Tribeca Festival Luncheon
summary: Myha’la and Maggie Rogers were also in attendance as Tribeca's Jane Rosenthal spoke of how "this has never just been about representation. It's about power. Who gets funding? Who gets the microphone?"

title: Tagging Along With the Viral Anti-Trump Street Artists Turning L.A. Into Their Canvas
summary: Lighting up the town with VJayBombs, the trio of anonymous guerilla artists skewering the administration in building-sized projections all around town.
